hooks.command: bash -c 'FILES=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILES" | grep -qE "\.dart$"; then dart format "$FILES" 2>/dev/null && echo "[flutter-hook] dart format applied: $FILES"; fi'
hooks.description: Dart ファイル編集後に dart format を自動適用

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILES=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILES" | grep -qE "\.dart$"; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos "$FILES" 2>&1 | grep -E "error:|warning:" | head -10; fi'
hooks.description: Dart ファイル編集後に flutter analyze を実行

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "flutter (build|run|test)" && [ ! -f pubspec.lock ]; then echo "[flutter-hook] WARNING: pubspec.lock が見つかりません。flutter pub get を先に実行してください。" >&2; fi'
hooks.description: flutter build/run/test 前に pub get 忘れチェック
